description:
You are a CRM administrator for a landscaping services company. Your company uses Vtiger CRM to manage client accounts. Management has requested that you add a new dropdown field to classify customer organizations by their service tier level, so crews can be prioritized and SLAs enforced appropriately. Add a custom picklist field to the Organizations module with the following specifications:

- Field Label: Customer Tier
- Field Type: Picklist
- Picklist Values (in order): Standard, Premium, Enterprise, Strategic
- Location: 'Organization Information' block
